_status_note: verified_in_runner = fix instruction is present in source (static check) AND mirrored unit logic passes. Does NOT prove Claude follows the instruction at runtime.
title: Staff switch: Helen unavailable → user asks for any available tech
failing_behavior: After showing Helen's conflict message, when user said 'any other tech?', the AI repeated the Helen conflict message instead of offering other available technicians.
root_cause: Same root cause as RX-001. Additionally, the CONFLICT_RESOLUTION section was missing, so Claude had no instruction to handle vague staff-switch phrases. 'other tech'/'anyone' should map to staff:null which bypasses named-staff conflict check.

conversation.content: I want a manicure with Helen at 2pm tomorrow

Sorry, 2:00 PM with Helen is already booked. Closest available: 2:30 PM, 3:00 PM. Would you like one of those?
[STATE:{"intent":"booking_request","services":["Manicure"],"staff":"Helen","date":"2026-04-14","time":"14:00","name":null,"phone":null,"lang":"en","pendingAction":null,"existingBookingId":null}]

notes: When staff:null is set, _earlyCheckReady fires with checkStaff=false, skipping named-staff conflict check. Fixed in same version as RX-001.
